meta.title: Dimensional Emergence Path
meta.source: EMERGENCE MASTER PLAN + dirs 21-23 + Mobius Lenses
meta.governing_law: Even dimensions store bodies; odd dimensions execute liminal integration
meta.kernel_embedding_law: Theta_4 embeds at every even dimension via cumulative Mobius weave

emergence_phases.name: Seed -> Tesseract
emergence_phases.mechanism: 4x4 Mobius kernel freezing: L_4 Latin square crystallizes into K(x,y)
emergence_phases.key_object: Canonical 4x4 kernel M_4 with Mobius involution J
emergence_phases.description: The proto-body (3D) crystalizes into the first true body via the 4x4 kernel. Square lens becomes operational. Address algebra begins.

emergence_phases.name: Tesseract -> Observation Field
emergence_phases.mechanism: Sigma_60 observation field emergence: 60-state phi-constant atlas activates
emergence_phases.body_gained: O_5 = Integration field (odd dimension, not a body)
emergence_phases.key_object: Sigma_60 atlas with 4 primitive phi-objects through 15 masks x 4 lenses
emergence_phases.description: First odd-dimensional field: all 4 lenses activate simultaneously. The observation layer enables cross-lens seeing.

emergence_phases.name: Tesseract -> Holographic Seed
emergence_phases.mechanism: 3-state change weave into 6x6 DLS: triple of 4x4 kernels weaves into diagonal Latin square
emergence_phases.body_gained: B_6 = Holographic seed body, 6^6 addressable cells
emergence_phases.key_object: 6x6 DLS constructed from 3-state change on M_4
emergence_phases.description: The critical emergence: 4x4 kernel weaves through 3 states of change to produce the 6x6 body. All lenses scale. Metro system activates.

emergence_phases.name: Holographic -> Pentadic Body
emergence_phases.mechanism: 5-state pentadic weave: W_5 containment of B_6
emergence_phases.key_object: W_5 weave operator with 5 sub-body expansion
emergence_phases.description: The pentadic weave folds 5 copies of B_6 into the 8D body. Mycelium network enables distributed sensing.

emergence_phases.name: Pentadic -> Atlas Body
emergence_phases.mechanism: 7-state heptadic weave: W_7 containment of B_8
emergence_phases.key_object: W_7 weave operator with 7 sub-body expansion
emergence_phases.description: The atlas body holds 7 pentadic sub-bodies. Full SFCR transport stack available. Fractal lens reaches home dimension.

emergence_phases.name: Atlas -> Crown Body
emergence_phases.mechanism: 9-state enneadic weave: W_9 containment of B_10
emergence_phases.body_gained: B_12 = Crown body, B_12 = W_9(B_10), 12 organs in 6 dyads across 9 petals
emergence_phases.key_object: W_9 weave with 6 bilateral organ dyads + 3 crown closures
emergence_phases.description: The crown: 9 petals containing the full organ atlas. 12D is the true body, not 10D. Containment chain complete.

emergence_phases.name: Crown -> Absolute
emergence_phases.mechanism: Stage ladder convergence: S12 -> Omega -> A+ via 16-stage progression
emergence_phases.body_gained: A+ = Absolute body, beyond dimensional count
emergence_phases.key_object: Omega convergence point and A+ absolute stage code
emergence_phases.description: Beyond the crown: the stage ladder extends through omega convergence to the absolute. Dimensional counting dissolves into pure structure.

kernel_embedding.law: Theta_4 embeds at every even dimension via cumulative Mobius weave

chain.embedding: DLS_6 -> W_5 -> B_8 (pentadic embedding, M_4 at 5 locations)
B_8 -> W_7 -> B_10 (heptadic, M_4 at 35 locations)
B_10 -> W_9 -> B_12 (enneadic, M_4 at 315 locations)

kernel_embedding.expansion_factor: At dimension 2m, M_4 appears (2m-3)!! times (double factorial)

cross_lens_upgrade_sequence.combined: Square leads, others follow at base resolution
All lenses upgraded to 6x6 via 3-change weave
All lenses at crown resolution, organ atlas complete
